objects.query: SELECT DeveloperName FROM ProcedurePlanDefinitionVersion WHERE DeveloperName = 'RLM_Quote_Pricing_Procedure_Plan'

SELECT Description, Phase, ProcedurePlanVersionId, ResolutionType, SectionType, Sequence, SubSectionType FROM ProcedurePlanSection WHERE ProcedurePlanVersion.DeveloperName = 'RLM_Quote_Pricing_Procedure_Plan'
SELECT SubSectionType, Sequence FROM ProcedurePlanSection WHERE ProcedurePlanVersion.DeveloperName = 'RLM_Quote_Pricing_Procedure_Plan'
SELECT DeveloperName, MasterLabel FROM ExpressionSetDefinition WHERE DeveloperName IN ('PRM_DISTI_Pricing_Procedure')

SELECT ProcedurePlanSectionId, ProcedurePlanSection.SubSectionType, ExpressionSetDefinitionId, Priority, CriteriaLogic, ReadContextMapping, SaveContextMapping FROM ProcedurePlanOption WHERE ProcedurePlanSection.ProcedurePlanVersion.DeveloperName = 'RLM_Quote_Pricing_Procedure_Plan'
SELECT Priority, ProcedurePlanSection.SubSectionType FROM ProcedurePlanOption WHERE ProcedurePlanSection.ProcedurePlanVersion.DeveloperName = 'RLM_Quote_Pricing_Procedure_Plan'

SELECT ProcedurePlanOptionId, ProcedurePlanOption.Priority, ProcedurePlanOption.ProcedurePlanSection.SubSectionType, Sequence, Operator, ObjectField, FieldPath, ActualValue, DataType FROM ProcedurePlanCriterion WHERE ProcedurePlanOption.ProcedurePlanSection.ProcedurePlanVersion.DeveloperName = 'RLM_Quote_Pricing_Procedure_Plan'
